labels.ideal_content_profile: Process montages — studio work, sketching, mechanical hand motions synced to a steady pulse.
Club-floor crowds and high-intensity studio sessions; mechanical motion, rapid beat-locked cuts.
Lofi beatmaking, vinyl spins, slow hand motions on faders or pads.
Slow process storytelling — composer at desk, candid creative struggle, emotional payoffs.
Quiet outdoor moments, family b-roll, slow handheld pacing.
